---
title: "Test R MD"
format: docx
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
if (!requireNamespace("ftExtra", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("ftExtra", repos="http://cran.us.r-project.org")
library(jsonlite)
library(flextable)
library(ftExtra)

json_data <- r"([
  {"Name": "**Bold** Name", "Value": "100\nNext line"},
  {"Name": "Another", "Value": "200"}
])"

df <- jsonlite::fromJSON(json_data)
ft <- flextable(df)
ft <- colformat_md(ft, j=c("Name", "Value"))
ft <- bg(ft, bg = "#FFD966", part = "header")
ft
```
